derived.causal_summary: Follow-on to 114 packet. Builds the markdown-to-disk extraction layer that 114/003 deferred as a known limitation. The 114/003 eval-loop measured prompt-text quality only because SWE 1.6 --print returns markdown not files; D2 hard-gate fired on 4/7 fixtures and capped D1 to 0.0. 116 closes that gap with a sidecar extraction script wired into 114/002 score-variant.cjs behind an env flag, then re-runs the same 5 council-seeded variants × 7 fixtures with extraction + live claude-sonnet grader (003 used mock grader). Synthesis-v2.md compares v1 vs v2 rankings to confirm or revise 114/004's RCAF default. If ranking shifts, a v1.0.6.0 uplift follows in a separate packet.
